title: Meshtastic adapter surfaces dispatch bytes as text
description: python/src/lichen/interface/meshtastic/adapter.py:416-424 feeding 293-325 (new in commit 936600c332). create_adapter subscribes to node.set_on_receive, whose callback delivers the raw L2 payload INCLUDING the dispatch byte (node.py:374,383,391). on_message_received wraps those bytes as Meshtastic TEXT_MESSAGE_APP payloads — SCHC-compressed CoAP packets and routing announces surface in the phone app as binary-garbage text messages starting with 0x14/0x15. Fix: run classify_l2_payload first; translate only genuine application text payloads (or decompressed CoAP body).
